cache_invalidation_evidence.finding_1: Cache manifest shows chunk_count=11445 (Qwen model) and 11436 (multimodal model)
cache_invalidation_evidence.finding_2: Current corpus has 11457 chunks (per task context)
cache_invalidation_evidence.finding_4: Multimodal cache even more stale: 11436 vs 11457 = 21 chunk delta
cache_invalidation_evidence.conclusion: Cache was NOT rebuilt after corpus modification - embeddings are stale

regression_analysis.parameter_revert_test: Reverting chunk params (200/8 → 150/5) showed IDENTICAL metrics to regression run
regression_analysis.implication: Parameters are NOT the root cause
regression_analysis.hypothesis: Embedding cache invalidation is the root cause
regression_analysis.evidence: Cache manifests show stale chunk counts (11445/11436 vs current 11457)

step_2_rebuild_trigger.trigger: Next retrieval query will trigger automatic cache rebuild
step_2_rebuild_trigger.expected_behavior: ChunkVectorStore will detect missing cache and rebuild from corpus

step_3_verification.check_2: New embeddings should match current corpus hash

scenario_1_cache_was_root_cause.probability: HIGH (based on stale chunk count evidence)
scenario_1_cache_was_root_cause.interpretation: Cache invalidation was the root cause of -25% regression

scenario_2_cache_not_root_cause.interpretation: Deeper corpus/retrieval issue exists beyond cache

run_2_revert_150_5.finding: IDENTICAL metrics to regression run - parameters not the cause

root_cause_hypothesis.primary_hypothesis: Embedding cache invalidation due to corpus size change
evidence: Cache manifests show chunk_count mismatch (11445/11436 vs 11457)
Parameter revert did NOT improve metrics (both runs identical)
Latency increased significantly (781ms → 1070ms), suggesting stale embeddings
supporting_factors: Qwen embedding cache: 11445 chunks (12 chunks behind)
Both caches show is_contextual=true but may have wrong embeddings
Corpus hash mismatch would cause retrieval quality degradation

immediate: Monitor cache rebuild on next query execution
Verify new cache manifest shows chunk_count=11457
Re-run canary30 evaluation after cache rebuild completes
validation: Compare post-rebuild metrics against 2026-04-27 baseline (0.6667 Recall@5)
If Recall@5 returns to 0.6667: CONFIRMS cache was root cause
If Recall@5 remains at 0.5: Indicates deeper corpus/retrieval issue
